name: Green Bean Artichoke Casserole
directions: Combine all ingredients except french fried onions in a casserole dish and mix well.
(I usually do this with my hands so that the choke hearts get blended in well.) Top with onions and dot with butter.
Cover and bake in a 400F oven for 15 minutes.
Uncover and continue to bake for 15-20 minutes longer (or until onions start to brown).

similar.name: Grilled Artichokes With Sesame Dipping Sauce

name: Creamy Ranch Spinach Dip
directions: Mix together, chill and serve.
Serving suggestion: Hollow out a round loaf of french bread and fill with dip.
Serve with bread cubes and fresh vegetables.

name: Hot Leek and Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
Lightly grease a medium baking dish.
Blend together the leeks, cheese, mayonnaise and whipping cream.
Stir in the artichokes and pimentos.
Mix well, and transfer to the prepared baking dish.
Bake 25 minutes in the preheated oven, until lightly browned.

name: Alma's Spinach Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Mix the cream cheese and mayonnaise until smooth.
Blend in the remaining ingredients.
Spread into 8x8 baking dish.
Cover.
Bake for 20 minutes.
Bake additional 5 minutes uncovered.

name: Artichoke Dip... With Kick!
directions: Cut artichoke into bite size pieces and chop jalapeno peppers.
Mix all the ingredients together and put into a glass baking dish.
Bake at 350 until top is browned.
Serve with sliced bread and/or chopped up veggies.
Enjoy!

name: Creamy Baked Veggie Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 375°F.
Mix all ingredients together, reserving 1/4 cup of parmesan cheese.
Pour into 2-quart baking dish.
Sprinkle top with reserved parmesan cheese.
Bake 35 minutes.

name: Hot Artichoke Dip
directions: Drain artichoke hearts and mash well.  Add remaining ingredients, mix with fork then sprinkle paprika on the top.  Bake in a 350 oven for 30 minutes.
Serve hot with tortilla chips, crackers or pita bread.

name: Grilled Artichokes With Sesame Dipping Sauce
directions: For dipping sauce:
Whisk mayonnaise, Worcestershire sauce, olive oil, sesame oil, honey, lemon juice, and seasoned salt in small bowl to blend well. Cover and refrigerate until cold.
For artichokes:

Fill large bowl with cold water; add lemon juice. Cut off stem and top quarter of 1 artichoke. Bend back dark green outer leaves and snap off at artichoke base until only pale green and yellow leaves remain.
Cut any dark green areas off base. Cut artichoke lengthwise into 6 wedges. Place artichoke wedges in lemon water. Repeat with remaining artichokes.
Steam artichokes until tender, about 30 minutes. Cool. Remove choke and any purple-tipped leaves from center of artichoke wedges.
Dipping sauce and artichokes can be prepared 1 day ahead. Keep sauce refrigerated. Cover artichokes and refrigerate.
Prepare barbecue (medium-high heat). Stir olive oil and minced garlic in small bowl to blend.
Brush garlic oil over artichokes. Sprinkle artichokes with salt and pepper.
Grill artichokes until slightly charred, turning occasionally, about 8 minutes.
Transfer artichokes to platter and serve with dipping sauce.

name: Veggie Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients, stir well. Chill 3 hours. Serve with fresh veggies.

name: Hot Spinach & Artichoke Dip
directions: Coat a 9-inch pie plate with nonstick cooking spray; set aside.
In a large bowl, beat cream cheese, mayonnaise, parmesan, garlic, basil, garlic powder and salt.  Add the artichoke hearts and spinach; mix until well blended.

Spread mixture into prepared pan; top with mozzarella cheese.  Bake at 350° for 20-25 minutes until heated through and cheese is melted.  Garnish with tomatoes and serve immediately with baked tortilla chips.

name: Artichoke Dip
directions: Cut up artichokes into small bits.
Mix all ingredients together.
Spread in 9" square pan.
Bake at 350 for 1/2 hour.

name: Baked Artichoke and Spinach Dip
directions: Heat oven to 350 degrees F.
Lightly spray a 2-quart casserole dish.
In a bowl mix all ingredients except the mozzeralla cheese.
Transfer to the baking dish.
Bake for about 15-17 minutes; remove from oven sprinkle with mozzeralla cheese and return to oven until cheese is melted (about 4-5 minutes).

name: Radish Dip
directions: In a bowl, combine all ingredients.
Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Artichoke Dip No Spinach
directions: Juice the lemons and discard the rest (or keep for garnishing).
Combine the bread crumbs, water from the artichokes, lemon juice and olive oil.
Put the artichoke hearts in the blender and blend on high.
Add the artichoke hearts to the mixture.
Add cheese, garlic, and red pepper.
Put in a 4 quart dish and bake at 350 for 20 minutes until warmed through.
To garnish with the lemons shave off the rind into ringlets and put the ringlets around the outside of the dish.

name: Unbelievable Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix all ingredients, reserving 1/2 cup Swiss or mozzarella.
Pour into a baking dish and cover with remaining cheese.
Bake uncovered for 20-25 minutes.

name: Corn Dip
directions: Dice cream cheese and bring to room temperature.
Drain corn and tomatoes and mix together.
Mix in cream cheese.
Add chili powder, cumin and garlic powder.
Top with shredded cheddar cheese
Bake at 350 for 30 minutes in a glass pie plate or shallow casserole dish.

name: Artichoke Spinach Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 375°F
Combine artichokes, spinach, sour cream and mayonnaise in a bowl.
Add Parmesan cheese and garlic.
Mix well and spoon into small casserole dish.
Bake 20-25 minutes or until heated through.

name: B & B Artichoke Dip
directions: Drain artichoke hearts and place in large bowl.  Mash with fork until they are in bite-size pieces. Add drained green chiles, minced garlic, Parmesan cheese, cayenne pepper, and salt and mix until well blended.
Combine mayonnaise, sour cream, and milk.  Mix until smooth.  Add to artichoke mixture.
Bake in 350 degree oven for about 30 minutes or until thoroughly heated and light brown on top.   Serve in a sourdough bread bowl or with chips and warm bread.
Notes: You can mix all ingredients in the blender for a smoother consistency if desired. You can make this dish a day or two ahead of time, then pop it in the oven right before guests arrive!

name: Artichoke Dip W/ Pretzels
directions: Stir together chopped atrichoke hearts, sour cream, salad dressing, and chive.
Place in serving bowl.
Chill for 1 hour.
Surround with pretzels or melba toast rounds.
Enjoy!

name: Artichoke and Cheese Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix ingredients together and put in casserole dish.
Bake for 20-30 minutes or in lightly butteredt 3 1/2 quart crockpot for about an hour.
Serve with broken up french bread or wheat crackers.

name: Vegetable Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350F and lightly spritz a baking dish or 9" pie pan with cooking spray (Pam).
In a large bowl, combine artichokes, soup, carrots, 1/2 of the cheese, broccoli, and mustard.
Mix well.
Bake in prepared dish for 20 minutes.
Sprinkle with remaining cheese and bake another 5 minutes or until cheese is melted.

name: Spinach Supreme
directions: Preheat oven to 375 dg.
Thaw, drain and squeeze escess moisture out of chopped spinich.
Drain artichoke hearts and cut in half.  Layer on bottom of greased casserole dish.
Layer spinach on top of this.
Mix together cream cheese, mayonnaise, nutmeg and pepper with mixer or in blender until smooth.  Spread over spinach, then cover with grated cheese.
Bake uncovered at 375 dg. for 30-45 minutes until top is browned.

name: Lemon-Dill Dip
directions: Mix sour cream, mayonnaise, scallions, dill, lemon juice, salt, and any optional ingredients as listed.
Chill dip for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to marry.
Serve the dip with snow peas as your dipper(s).
Don't have snow peas? Use what is in season for your area. Blanched asparagus, baby carrots, or cucumbers or of course, chips.

name: Easy Artichoke Dip
directions: Drain artichokes. Grind in food processor until only small chunks remain.
Mix all together in an oven-proof dish.
Bake uncovered at 325 degrees for 20 minutes, until brown and bubbly.
Allow to cool for 5-10 minutes, because it comes out very hot!

name: Paula Deen's Spinach Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. Grease a casserole dish with nonstick spray.
Heat the spinach in a microwave oven on high for 5 minutes and squeeze dry. Drain the artichoke hearts and coarsely chop in a food processor.
Combine all the ingredients except the jack cheese in a large bowl. Stir well. Scrape into the prepared casserole dish and sprinkle the jack cheese on top. Bake for 30 minutes.

name: Hot Artichoke Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients in the Double Dipper unit.
Cover and heat 30 to 60 minutes or until hot.
Serve with tortilla chips.

name: Rich and Creamy Artichoke Casserole
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Combine mayonnaise, parmesan, garlic and pepper well; add artichoke hearts and mix.
Pour into small greased casserole dish and bake at 350F for 10 minutes.
Top with french fried onions and bake an additional 5 minutes, or until lightly browned.

name: Spinach and Artichoke Dip
directions: Thaw spinach, melt butter, let cream cheese soften, drain artichoke hearts and spinach.
Chop onion.
Mix together all ingredients thoroughly, except monterey jack cheese (which goes on top).
Bake at 375 degrees until cheese is melted as you like it.

name: Spunky Spinach Dip
directions: mix all ingredients together in microwave safe bowl, sitr well.
microwave on medium setting until heated through.

name: Hot  Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat the oven to 350.
Mix first 5 ingredients in a medium mixing bowl using a wooden spoon or your hands until combined.
Spread into a small baking dish and smooth out the top.
Sprinkle with paprika.
Bake in a 350 degree over for 40-45 minutes or until the top is bubbly.

name: 3 Ingredient Spinach Dip (No Mayo)
directions: Thaw and squeeze dry the spinach.
place spinach in serving bowl.
add sour cream
add the vegetable recipe mix.
combine
chill at least 20 minutes.

name: Super Simple Jalapeno Dip
directions: De-seed and dice the jalapenos. In a mixing bowl blend all ingredientswith a fork. Chill and serve!

name: Rockin Radish Dip
directions: In a chopper, chop radish and garlic together. Mix room temperature cream cheese and all other ingredients together and chill. Serve with pita chips or your favorite cracker.

name: Creamy Parmesan Spinach Dip
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a medium bowl. Can be made one day in advance and stored in the refrigerator. Remove from refrigerator 30 minutes before serving. Makes about 2 cups.
